cardano/transaction/OutputReference.title: OutputReference
cardano/transaction/OutputReference.description:
An `OutputReference` is a unique reference to an output on-chain. The `output_index`
 corresponds to the position in the output list of the transaction (identified by its id)
 that produced that output

probx/types/AssetClass.title: AssetClass
probx/types/AssetClass.description:
An authenticated state token. Each deployed market uses distinct market
 and liquidity thread-token names under a one-shot policy.

probx/types/BootstrapRedeemer.title: BootstrapRedeemer
probx/types/BootstrapRedeemer.description:
The final state-validator hashes are supplied at the one-shot mint. They
 cannot be static policy parameters because the state policy id is itself a
 dependency of the applied position and market validators.

probx/types/CurveConfig.title: CurveConfig
probx/types/CurveConfig.description:
Integer-only curve configuration. `payout_per_share` must be divisible by
 10,000 so every 1%-99% marginal price and 1% fee is exact in lovelace.

probx/types/MarketDatum.title: MarketDatum
probx/types/MarketDatum.description:
Single market state. The extra base/counter fields make value conservation
 and terminal settlement explicit while retaining the README's fields.

probx/types/MarketRedeemer.title: MarketRedeemer
probx/types/MarketRedeemer.description: Constructor order is an off-chain API and is documented in README.md.
